# Third tick, following traefik_scrape_1.txt/traefik_scrape_2.txt -
# simulates a Traefik process restart between scrape 2 and this scrape:
# every counter is reset to a small value, and series that hadn't been
# hit yet since the restart (e.g. no 4xx/5xx observed again yet) are
# absent entirely, exactly like a freshly restarted Traefik's /metrics
# output would look (a series only appears once it's been observed at
# least once post-restart). Format/label shape unchanged from scrape 1/2
# (still grounded in the real capture - only the values + which series
# are present differ, which is exactly what a restart looks like on the
# wire).
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="0.1"} 2
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="0.3"} 2
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="1.2"} 2
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="5"} 2
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file",le="+Inf"} 2
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file",le="0.1"} 3
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file",le="0.3"} 5
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file",le="1.2"} 8
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file",le="5"} 10
traefik_router_request_duration_seconds_bucket{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file",le="+Inf"} 10
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file"} 0
traefik_router_requests_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 80
traefik_router_requests_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file"} 2
traefik_router_requests_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 10
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="tamga-ui@file",service="tamga-frontend@file"} 500
traefik_router_responses_bytes_total{code="200",method="GET",protocol="http",router="project-42@file",service="project-42@file"} 4000
